title: Pityrogramma aurea
taxonomy: Pityrogramma aurea is classified within the family Marattiaceae. This family is a group of ancient ferns that are part of the more comprehensive division Pteridophyta. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally recognized as a member of the Marattiaceae family.
